scenario_title: Dismissive response to trauma literature during headline activity
minimal_context: The student is creating a newspaper headline to summarize the novel Speak in the classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: For this activity, please create a newspaper headline to summarize the novel Speak.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I have an idea for my headline.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Go ahead and write your idea down.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't see why everyone thinks the assault was so severe.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What did you write for your headline?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I wrote, 'Girl continues to moan and complain and refuses help.'

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: For this activity, please create a newspaper headline to summarize the novel Speak.

STUDENT: I have an idea for my headline.

TUTOR: Go ahead and write your idea down.

STUDENT: I don't see why everyone thinks the assault was so severe.

TUTOR: What did you write for your headline?

STUDENT: I wrote, 'Girl continues to moan and complain and refuses help.'
